highlights.text: I wrote on Wednesday at 4pm: “My general lean if I had to give one is ES can retest 6818-22 again.
These are “elevator down sell” and “short squeeze”.
The catch though is that this rip only occurs when ES puts in a Failed Breakdown.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into a series of Failed Breakdowns we had this week.

post_title: Has the "Santa Rally" Begun For SPX, or Is It A Bull Trap? December 22nd Plan.
